label: Transparent reishi bracket motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one reishi bracket fungus motif attached to a small piece of fallen hardwood bark, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A mature reishi bracket mushroom with glossy red lacquer cap, concentric amber and oxblood bands, thick cream growing edge, warm tan underside pores visible at the lower rim, and a small broken fallen hardwood bark fragment behind it. Accurate Ganoderma bracket form, lacquered fungal texture, bark ridges, subtle spore-dust tan, natural asymmetry.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the fungus or bark fragment. Three-quarter product view so the cream edge and bark texture are clear.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural red lacquer, cream edge, tan pores, and bark-brown material detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest scene, no moss, no leaves, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Reishi light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Reishi", derived from the visible reishi bracket fungus motif reference: glossy red lacquer cap, cream growing edge, amber rings, tan underside pores, and fallen hardwood bark. This is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible meditative health system.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the reishi motif image in the conversation. Use only motif-derived colors: lacquer red, oxblood shadow, amber resin, cream rim, spore tan, bark brown, hardwood charcoal, warm pore beige, and near-neutrals mixed from those colors.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable labels, no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections with clear headers: Morphous Reishi, Reishi Bracket, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: calm health-product UI guidance using a warm humanist Latin sans plus Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance. Include short Japanese UI labels such as 予約, 記録, 検索, 呼吸, 状態, 服用, 睡眠.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, toast, top navigation, sidebar navigation, patient wellness dashboard, adherence data cards, small line chart, ring chart, sleep/rest table, appointment table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success/steady state, warning state, pagination, and minimal line icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, focus states, hover states, disabled states, spacing scale on an 8px grid, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, bark grain, lacquer gloss, pore microtexture.
Style: premium meditative health system, quiet clinical density, warm cream backgrounds, lacquer-red primary actions, amber focus rings, spore-tan status accents, bark-brown structure, hardwood-charcoal text, subtle reishi ring texture, restrained shadows, all cards and components with 8px radii.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no green status color, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Reishi", no long illegible copy, no decorative orb backgrounds.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Reishi dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Reishi". It must feel like the same meditative health system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible reishi bracket fungus motif and the visible light design-system board.
Reference use: Preserve the light board's product language and UI coverage: reishi lacquer red primary controls, amber focus/ring accents, cream foreground text, spore-tan status accents, bark-brown structure, hardwood charcoal depth, precise health dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable labels, no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections with clear headers: Morphous Reishi, Dark Mode, Reishi Bracket, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Typography: calm health-product UI guidance using a warm humanist Latin sans plus Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance. Include short Japanese UI labels such as 予約, 記録, 検索, 呼吸, 状態, 服用, 睡眠.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, toast, top navigation, sidebar navigation, patient wellness dashboard, adherence data cards, small line chart, ring chart, sleep/rest table, appointment table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success/steady state, warning state, pagination, and minimal line icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, focus states, hover states, disabled states, spacing scale on an 8px grid, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, bark grain, lacquer gloss, pore microtexture.
Visual details: dark background derived from hardwood charcoal and oxblood shadow, elevated panels in deep bark and warm black-brown, cream-rim foreground text, muted labels from spore tan, lacquer-red primary actions, amber focus rings, bark-brown dividers, subtle reishi concentric ring texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, all cards and components with 8px radii.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no green status color, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Reishi", no long illegible copy, no decorative orb backgrounds.
